steps.title: Identify what the student needs
steps.content: The student wants to provide a specific example of a public service that Ixmiquilpan is responsible for. The notes name exactly one specific service: water treatment. Any correct choice must name that service explicitly.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the match
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'As a municipality, Ixmiquilpan is responsible for providing water treatment to its residents.': names water treatment specifically as the service Ixmiquilpan provides — a direct example. ✓
  • Choice B — 'Ixmiquilpan is one of 84 municipalities in Hidalgo providing public services to their communities.': mentions services in general and focuses on how many municipalities exist, not on any specific service. ✗
  • Choice C — 'Ixmiquilpan—a governmental region in the state of Hidalgo, Mexico—provides public services to its residents.': says "public services" generically without naming any particular one. ✗
  • Choice D — 'In 2020, the municipality of Ixmiquilpan had a population of 98,654.': gives a population figure, not a public service example at all. ✗
That confirms A is correct.
